findings.description: The multi-column layout of the document header has been lost.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the agency logo is positioned on the left, while the official names and titles (PAT MCCRORY, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART, etc.) are positioned on the right, creating a two-column header layout. The HTML collapses this into a single vertical column, placing the text directly below the logo.

findings.description: Extraneous metadata has been extracted and inserted into the visible reading order.
findings.evidence: A block of text detailing a digital signature ('Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner... DN: cn=... Date:...') appears in the HTML between the 'From' and 'Subject' fields. This metadata is not part of the visible text flow in the source PDF and disrupts the standard memorandum format.

findings.description: A decorative graphical element has been incorrectly rendered, resulting in a large visual artifact.
findings.evidence: In the HTML output corresponding to the transition from page 1 to page 2, there is a large, thick green and blue rectangular block. This appears to be a distorted, incorrectly scaled rendering of the thin decorative line found in the footer of the source PDF.
